_note: Declarative rules the orchestration-planner composes the agent graph from. The TASK shape (type/risk/surfaces) picks which teams and gates run, instead of always running the full static pipeline. HONEST PROXY for Anthropic Dynamic Workflows: this composes from a FIXED agent set; it does not generate novel agents at runtime. Tune over time (Kaizen) as eval data shows which phases earn their cost.

by_risk.trivial: skip architects + product team; build → single reflexion gate → memory
by_risk.normal: full spec (architects + product), surface-based build, parallel gates
